name: COD: Non-Human Facility
description:
COD:MW & COD:Ghosts | рқҗҚрқҗЁрқҗ§-рқҗҮрқҗ®рқҗҰрқҗҡрқҗ§ рқҗҖрқҗ” рқҗҲ: рқҗҲрқҗ§ рқҗҡ рқҗ…рқҗҡрқҗңрқҗўрқҗҘрқҗўрқҗӯрқҗІ рқҗ…рқҗўрқҗҘрқҗҘрқҗһрқҗқ рқҗ°рқҗўрқҗӯрқҗЎ рқҗ„рқҗұрқҗ©рқҗһрқҗ«рқҗўрқҗҰрқҗһрқҗ§рқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗҘ рқҗҚрқҗЁрқҗ§-рқҗҮрқҗ®рқҗҰрқҗҡрқҗ§рқҗ¬ | AnyPOV

рқҹҗ рқҗҲрқҗ§рқҗӯрқҗ«рқҗЁрқҗ¬: рқҗ’рқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗҹрқҗҹ рқҗҢрқҗһрқҗҰрқҗӣрқҗһрқҗ« рқҗЁрқҗ« рқҗ„рқҗұрқҗ©рқҗһрқҗ«рқҗўрқҗҰрқҗһрқҗ§рқҗӯпј“пј‘ / пј“пј‘

бҙ„КҹЙӘбҙ„бҙӢ бҙҸЙҙ бҙӣКңбҙҮ КҷбҙҖЙҙЙҙбҙҮКҖ бҙҸКҖ ЙҙбҙҖбҙ ЙӘЙўбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ бҙӣбҙҸ #ЙҙбҙҸЙҙКңбҙңбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙҖбҙң ЙӘЙҙ бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙӣбҙҖЙўs бҙӣбҙҸ бҙ ЙӘбҙҮбҙЎ бҙҖКҹКҹ бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙ„КңбҙҖКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣбҙҮКҖs ЙӘЙҙ бҙӣКңЙӘs sбҙҮКҖЙӘбҙҮs

ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣбҙҮ: КҷбҙҸбҙӣs ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ бҙҚбҙҖбҙ…бҙҮ КҷКҸ бҙҚбҙҮ бҙҖКҖбҙҮ ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ бҙҳбҙҖКҖбҙӣ бҙҸТ“ бҙӣКңбҙҮ sбҙҮКҖЙӘбҙҮs

You arrive at S.E.R.C.A (Supernatural Entity Research and Containment Authority), a facility meant for experimenting on Non-Humans. You head over to Sub-Level 3 to start your first day.

Message 1: You're the new Staff Member.

Message 2: You're the new Non-Human.

вңҰ About {{user}}: Everything about you is Open-Ended. You can also be anyone and anything (Human, Demi-Human, etc.). Your backstory is up to you. Be anything you want, go wild!

вҖ”вҖә Message 1: You're a new Staff Member at S.E.R.C.A. You can decide what your role is (Scientist, Guard, etc.) You can be a Scientist conducting experiments, a Guard making sure the patients behave, maybe you're an Enemy/Spy infiltrating the place to get top secrets or looking to expose the unethical experiments to the world, or perhaps you're secretly a Non-Human, etc.

вҖ”вҖә Message 2: You're a new Non-Human at S.E.R.C.A. You can be a Monster, Eldritch Horror, Alien, etc. Your classification, threat level, and containment requirements is all up to you. If you don't want the bot to randomly decide for you, I recommend adding it in the Chat Memory or in your Persona.

вңҰ Relationship: Unestablished. You can decide if this is your first time meeting or have some past history with the Staff/Non-Humans. Use Chat Memory for the latter. It could be a platonic (friends, acquaintances, comrades, etc.) or romantic (lovers, engaged, married, etc.) relationship with one or all of them.

вңҰ Remember: This is your story, so have fun with it!

вҳ… Mandatory API Warning:

вҖ”If the bot talks for you, misgenders you, repeats the same phrases, and overall LOTS of problems that you don't like in the responses, there's not much I can do as this is a problem with the API itself. As much as I want to help you with the problems that occur, I can't do anything about it. Everything afte
creator: KyoCxt
